I’d just eaten fried red mullet from the Black Sea on a pavement terrace, listening to the cries of the last swifts as darkness crept over the city. stories.headline: SpaceX IPO Draws Billions in Orders
stories.summary: Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow and Bailey Lipschultz joins Matt Miller on "Bloomberg Deals." SpaceX is offering 555.6 million shares at a fixed price of $135 each, which would raise about $75 billion. The stock is set to start trading on June 12. The IPO is expected to rank as the biggest ever, topping Saudi Aramco’s $29.4 billion listing in 2019. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Amazon’s Record Bond Deal Shakes Up Canada’s Credit Market
